reviews.review_description: The fricking rope they i spine with IS SO UNBELIVALLY BUGGY my crowbar fazed right through it and also if i reset my height once doesn't mean it gotta be that forever. Also the word bounce physects its like the game Stuff : horror
This game was soooo good i think that you should make a second one and add some better graphics

I think game is good. Hard to master but its good and full of fun. Game levels are hard but very fun also playable. I completed several levels. New update is very good very fun. Good game for this price
It just doesn’t feel right it’s just not good at all. I highly do not recommend this never play this game and do not even waste your money. ￼

reviews.review_description: Very horrible, i keep glitching through the map. NOT WORTH. Lazy game

There is way to much glitch on the zip line and i have done the same level 6 times

sorry to here that. please give a full detailed feed back we will work on the issues and improve  play experience
